name: Sparinvest Value Europa KL
summary: Sparinvest Valuta Europa KL is an equity fund launched and managed by Egns-Invest. The fund invests in the public equity markets of Germany. It seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund was formerly known as Sparinvest Valuta Europa. Sparinvest Valuta Europa KL is domiciled in Denmark.
